description_es: Une las tablas users y orders por user_id.
description_en: Join users and orders tables by user_id.
initial_script:
-- Crea ambas tablas y únelas con INNER JOIN

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders (
  order_id INT,
  user_id INT,
  product STRING,
  amount DOUBLE,
  order_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT u.name, o.product, o.amount
FROM users u
INNER JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id;

description_es: Encuentra países con más de 5 usuarios.
description_en: Find countries with more than 5 users.
initial_script:
-- Cuenta por país y filtra con HAVING

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT country, COUNT(*) as total
FROM users
GROUP BY country
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5;
hints_es: HAVING filtra después de GROUP BY

description_es: Lista todos los usuarios y sus órdenes, incluyendo usuarios sin órdenes.
description_en: List all users and their orders, including users without orders.
initial_script:
-- Usa LEFT JOIN para incluir todos los usuarios

-- TODO: Escribe tu solución aquí
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  user_id INT,
  name STRING,
  age INT,
  country STRING,
  signup_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders (
  order_id INT,
  user_id INT,
  product STRING,
  amount DOUBLE,
  order_date STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/'
TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT u.name, o.product
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id;
hints_es: LEFT JOIN mantiene todas las filas de la tabla izquierda
hints_en: LEFT JOIN keeps all rows from left table
Users without orders will have NULL

solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (user_id INT, name STRING, age INT, country STRING, signup_date STRING) ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',' STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/' TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

description_es: Combina nombre y país en una sola columna.
initial_script:
-- Usa CONCAT para unir strings

-- TODO
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (user_id INT, name STRING, age INT, country STRING, signup_date STRING) ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',' STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/' TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT CONCAT(name, ' from ', country) as description FROM users;

description_es: Extrae los primeros 3 caracteres del nombre.
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (user_id INT, name STRING, age INT, country STRING, signup_date STRING) ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',' STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/' TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT name, SUBSTRING(name, 1, 3) as prefix FROM users;

description_es: Encuentra usuarios con nombres de más de 5 letras.
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (user_id INT, name STRING, age INT, country STRING, signup_date STRING) ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',' STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/' TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT name FROM users WHERE LENGTH(name) > 5;

description_es: Convierte nombres a mayúsculas y países a minúsculas.
solution_script:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (user_id INT, name STRING, age INT, country STRING, signup_date STRING) ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',' STORED AS TEXTFILE LOCATION '/datasets/' TBLPROPERTIES ('skip.header.line.count'='1');

SELECT UPPER(name) as name_upper, LOWER(country) as country_lower FROM users;
